case_title: AIPING ZHANG VS. YUI FUNG TANG

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, AIPING SERVED DEC-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-03-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, AIPING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS A DECISION ON THE SOLE ISSUE OF PLAINTIFF'S ENTITLEMENT TO RELOCATION BENEFITS PURSUANT TO THE SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE, AND IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY OTHER CLAIM FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, MISREPRESENTATION OR OTHER CONTRACT ISSUES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ZHANG, AIPING AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, YUI FUNG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.
